all.en: Last Saturday, my partner and I drove to the animal shelter outside of town.
all.zh: 上週六，我和伴侶開車到城外的動物收容所。

all.en: The volunteer at the front desk gave us a long form to fill out.
all.zh: 前台的志工給了我們一張長長的表格要填寫。

all.en: Then she walked us through the kennels, where dozens of dogs were barking.
all.zh: 接著她帶我們穿過狗舍，幾十隻狗正在汪汪叫。

all.en: One quiet brown mutt watched us from the corner of his cage.
all.zh: 有一隻安靜的棕色米克斯，從籠子角落望著我們。

all.en: His tag said his name was Mocha and he had been there for six months.
all.zh: 牌子上寫著他叫摩卡，已經在那裡待了六個月。

all.en: When I knelt down, he came forward and gently licked my fingers.
all.zh: 我蹲下時，他走過來輕輕舔了我的手指。

all.en: We knew right away that he was the one we wanted to bring home.
all.zh: 我們當下就確定他就是我們想帶回家的狗。

all.en: The adoption fee covered his vaccinations and a small starter pack of food.
all.zh: 領養費包含他的疫苗與一份小小的食物試用包。

all.en: On the drive back, Mocha curled up on my lap and fell asleep.
all.zh: 回程的路上，摩卡蜷縮在我腿上睡著了。

all.en: That evening, our quiet apartment finally felt like a real home.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我們安靜的公寓終於有了真正家的感覺。

all.en: We promised him he would never have to sleep in a cage again.
all.zh: 我們對他承諾，他再也不必睡在籠子裡了。

all.en: The first week with Mocha required a lot of patience from both of us.
all.zh: 和摩卡相處的第一週，我們倆都需要相當多的耐心。

all.en: He was afraid of loud noises and would hide under the sofa during thunderstorms.
all.zh: 他怕巨大的聲響，下雷雨時會躲到沙發底下。

all.en: We slowly introduced him to new sounds, smells, and short walks in the park.
all.zh: 我們慢慢讓他適應新的聲音、氣味，並進行短程的公園散步。

all.en: Our neighbor's friendly golden retriever helped him learn how to play with other dogs.
all.zh: 鄰居那隻友善的黃金獵犬幫助他學會如何和其他狗狗玩耍。

all.en: The vet was pleased to see that Mocha had already gained two healthy kilograms.
all.zh: 獸醫很高興地發現摩卡已經健康地增加了兩公斤體重。

all.en: We signed him up for a basic obedience class held in the community center.
all.zh: 我們幫他報名了社區活動中心舉辦的基礎服從訓練課程。

all.en: Within a month, he could sit, stay, and even shake hands on command.
all.zh: 不到一個月，他就能聽口令乖乖坐下、不動，甚至握手。

all.en: One afternoon, he surprised us by bringing his leash to the door by himself.
all.zh: 某天下午，他居然自己把牽繩叼到門邊，讓我們很驚訝。

all.en: We took him on his very first weekend trip to a dog-friendly mountain cabin.
all.zh: 我們帶他展開第一趟週末旅行，前往一間寵物友善的山中小屋。

all.en: Watching him run freely through the grass, I knew rescuing him was the best decision.
all.zh: 看著他在草地上自由奔跑，我深知領養他是我們最棒的決定。

all.en: Back home, Mocha settled happily into his daily rhythm of walks and treats.
all.zh: 回到家後，摩卡開心地融入了每天散步與點心的生活節奏。

all.en: He developed an adorable habit of fetching the morning newspaper from the front step.
all.zh: 他養成了一個可愛的習慣，會從門口階梯把早報叼進來。

all.en: My partner taught him to ring a bell with his nose when he needed to go outside.
all.zh: 我的伴侶教他在想出門時用鼻子按響一個小鈴鐺。

all.en: Friends who once avoided dogs now asked to take Mocha for short afternoon walks.
all.zh: 原本怕狗的朋友現在會主動要求帶摩卡出去散個短短的下午步。

all.en: He stayed calm at the vet, which made every checkup smooth and stress-free.
all.zh: 他在獸醫診所總是很冷靜，讓每次健檢都順暢無壓力。

all.en: During the holidays, we knitted him a small sweater in his favorite shade of green.
all.zh: 假期時，我們為他織了一件他最愛的綠色小毛衣。

all.en: He proudly wore it on cold mornings, prancing through frosty grass with confidence.
all.zh: 寒冷的早晨他驕傲地穿著毛衣，自信地踏過結霜的草地。

all.en: We started fostering a second rescue dog briefly to see how Mocha would react.
all.zh: 我們開始短期寄養第二隻救援犬，看看摩卡會作何反應。

all.en: To our delight, Mocha gently shared his toys and his bed with the new visitor.
all.zh: 令我們欣喜的是，摩卡溫和地與這位新訪客分享玩具和睡床。

all.en: That kindness convinced us that our gentle boy had truly healed from his lonely past.
all.zh: 那份溫柔讓我們相信，這個溫柔的男孩真的已從孤單的過去痊癒。
